---
title: "Data Mining (DM GEI - FIB)"
toc: true
number-sections: true
---

[Introducció de l'assignatura]()

## Data Sciences Tools

[Data Sciences Tools](material/00_Introduction/DataProcessingTools.html)

## Data preparation

[Preprocessing - EDA](https://ramia-lab.github.io/AdvancedModelling/material/01_AdvancedPreprocessing/laboratorio/01_automaticEDA.R)

[Preprocessing - Outliers detection](https://ramia-lab.github.io/AdvancedModelling/material/01_AdvancedPreprocessing/laboratorio/02_deteccioOutliers.R)

- [Database sesion 1 - Sant Valentin Dates](https://ramia-lab.github.io/AdvancedModelling/material/01_AdvancedPreprocessing/laboratorio/valentine_dataset.csv)

[Preprocessing - Missing Data Treatment](https://ramia-lab.github.io/AdvancedModelling/material/01_AdvancedPreprocessing/laboratorio/03_01_ImputationMethods.R)

[Preprocessing - MIMMI](https://ramia-lab.github.io/AdvancedModelling/material/01_AdvancedPreprocessing/laboratorio/03_02_MIMMI.R)

## Visualization and Dimensionality reduction

[Principal Components Analysis (PCA)]()

[Simple Correspondence Analysis (SCA)](https://ramia-lab.github.io/AdvancedModelling/material/04_CorrespondenceAnalysis/laboratorio/ACS.html)

[Multiple Correspondence Analysis (MCA)]()

[Factorial Analysis with Mixed Data (FAMD)](https://ramia-lab.github.io/AdvancedModelling/material/04_CorrespondenceAnalysis/laboratorio/FAMD.html)

[Principal Coordinates Analysis (PCoA)]()

## Clustering 

[KMeans Method]()

[KMediods Method]()

[Hierarchical Method]()

[Profiling (LP, TERMOMETRO, aTLP)]()

## Predictive Models

[Lineal Regresion]()

[Logistic Regresion]()

## Asociation Rules

[Asociation Rules]()

## Decisions Trees, Bagging and Ensamble Methods

[Decisions Trees]()

[Bagging Methods]()

[Bagging Methods]()

## Discriminant models and Non Parametric Discriminant

[Naives Bayes]()

[k-Nearest Neighbour]()

[Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA)]()

[Cuadratic Discriminant Analysis (QDA)]()

## Support Vector Machine (SVM)

[Support Vector Machine (SVM)]()

## Neuronal Networks (NN)

[Artificial Neuronal Network (ANN)]()

[Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)]()
